bibliographic_info.title: Real-time PPP with the fusion of Galileo HAS and BDS-3 PPP-B2b

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Measurement 257 (2026) 118829 Contents lists available at ScienceDirect Measurement journal homepage: www.elsevier.com/locate/measurement Real-time PPP with the fusion of Galileo HAS and BDS-3 PPP-B2b Kai Zhenga , Zikang Yea, Jianhe Zhaoa, Qiang Maa, Wenju Fua,*, Jiahuan Hub , Kezhong Liua, Long Tangc, Xiaohong Zhangd aSchool of Navigation, Wuhan University of Technology, Wuhan 4
Variance component estimation However, these services operate independently, each supporting different GNSS constellations, thus limiting PPP-B2b users from fully exploiting multi-GNSS systems.
